findings.title: Missing RbacDecision Unit Tests
findings.description: No unit tests exist for RbacDecision.java (factory methods allow() and deny())
findings.recommendation: Add RbacDecisionTest.java with tests for allow(), deny(), and edge cases

findings.title: Permission Enum Not Used in I1
findings.description: The Permission enum is defined but not referenced by any other I1 component
findings.recommendation: Verify I2 plan uses Permission enum or remove if unnecessary

findings.title: AuditLogRepository Missing Query Methods for I2
findings.description: Repository lacks findByAction() and findByResult() methods needed for I2
findings.recommendation: Add query methods in I2: findByAction(), findByResult()

findings.title: Component Scan Configuration Not Updated
findings.description: McpApplication.java does not include rbac package in component scan
findings.recommendation: Add RbacConfig with @ComponentScan for com.aiadvent.mcp.backend.rbac in I2

findings.title: Migration File Location Convention
findings.description: Migration is in rbac/ subdirectory but no master changelog imports it
findings.recommendation: Configure Liquibase to load rbac changelog in I2

blockers.title: Component Scan
blockers.description: RBAC beans won't be loaded without config update
blockers.resolution: Add RbacConfig to McpApplication.java in I2

AC-2.evidence: Schema defined, entity created, repository functional. Full AC-2 completion requires I2 audit logging service.

next_actions: Begin I2: RBAC WebFilter + Audit logging service
Address B1 and B2 as part of I2 setup
handoff_notes: I1 is functionally complete and ready for sign-off. Address component scan and Liquibase config in I2.
